title: Create Xcode project scaffold with models and services
description: Xcode project, App entry, models (Account, Mailbox, Message), services (GmailAPI, Auth, Keychain), 3-pane ContentView skeleton

title: Implement all SwiftUI views and ViewModels
description: SidebarView, MessageListView, MessageDetailView, ComposeView, SearchBar, all ViewModels with Gmail service wiring

title: Write unit tests with mocks
description: Unit tests for models, services (mocked), and view models. Docker-ready test runner.

title: Build verification and GCP setup guide
description: Verify app builds, tests pass, create GCP_SETUP.md with OAuth registration guidance

title: Enable multiple concurrent compose windows via Cmd+N
description: Use WindowGroup with value type to allow multiple compose windows. Create ComposeContext model, update MaxBoxApp.swift scene, and ensure each window has independent state.

title: Build message cache on account creation
description: After OAuth completes and account is added, trigger background fetch of inbox/sent/drafts messages. Show progress in activity manager.

title: Animated search icon that expands to text input with search arrow
description: Replace SearchBar with magnifying glass icon that animates to larger text input on click. Add arrow button next to expanded input to initiate search.

title: Double-click message to open in own window with action toolbar
description: Open message in separate window on double-click. Toolbar: reply, reply all, forward, archive, delete icons. Need new MessageWindowView and WindowGroup scene.

title: Double-click draft to resume editing in new compose window
description: Detect draft double-click in message list. Open compose window pre-filled with draft content for continued editing. Depends on multi-compose.

title: Expand .gitignore with comprehensive patterns
description: Add patterns for xcresult, logs, env files, build artifacts, IDE settings

title: Push code to pubino/maxbox repo
description: Repo already exists (private). Push all current code.

title: Create GitHub Pages site
description: Create simple GitHub Pages site in docs/ folder with project info

title: Add interactive notarization script
description: zsh script that pulls info from Keychain, prompts for rest, colorful output, uses keychain profile notary

title: Document app and developer info in README.md
description: Expand README with comprehensive app description, developer info, features

title: Add LICENSE.md with MIT license
description: MIT license, copyright Princeton University

title: Security audit
description: Audit OAuth handling, Keychain usage, secrets management, entitlements, OWASP patterns

title: Data loss risk audit
description: Audit message caching, drafts, token storage, error handling for data loss risk

title: Create ComposeContext model, new compose-reply WindowGroup, and update ComposeView to pre-populate fields from reply/forward context
description: Foundation for reply/forward feature. Create ComposeContext enum (reply/replyAll/forward) with original message. Add WindowGroup in MaxBoxApp. Update ComposeView to accept context and populate To/Cc/Subject/Body.

title: Add Reply, Reply All, Forward buttons to main ContentView toolbar
description: Add three buttons to ContentView toolbar, disabled when no message selected. Wire to open compose-reply window with ComposeContext.

title: Update MessageWindowView reply/forward to use ComposeContext
description: Replace stub implementations that open blank compose. Pass ComposeContext with original message data.

title: Verify/fix click-to-select on message list rows
description: Ensure clicking anywhere on a message row selects it. List(selection:) + .tag() should handle this but verify and add .contentShape(Rectangle()) if needed.

title: Add Privacy tab to Settings with Load Remote Images toggle
description: Add Privacy tab with a toggle for Load Remote Images Automatically (default disabled). Store in UserDefaults via AppStorage.

title: Add remote images banner to message detail view
description: When Load Remote Images is disabled, show banner at top of message body indicating remote images present with button to load for that message only. Modify HTMLContentView to block/allow remote images.
